projects.title: D8
projects.description: Created as part of the 2018 DigitalCrafts Immersive Coding Bootcamp. D8 is a web application that receives user input via a quiz. It outputs restaurant and movie suggestions in the user's area. I worked as a designer as part of a four-person team. I first prototyped the design using Adobe XD.
